1008:
Collapsible content

Shipping

- Free shipping on $79
- Delivery within 24 hours, update the logistics number within 48 hours
- Your order will be delivered in about 7-30 business days.(Depending on the logistics you choose at the time of purchase)
-Logistics partners: FedEx, DHL, 4PX, UPS, USPS.

If you would like to choose your delivery method, please contact us within 2 hours of ordering.

Please note：Customs DutyImport duties, taxes, and charges are not included in the item's price or shipping charges (Except U.S. addresses). If you have special requests about your customs, such as labeling, packing, invoices, etc. Pls tell us before we send it out, we are happy to follow your instructions. By default, if you refuse Customs and make the package returned or destroyed, we don't refund or compensate.

Return

Last updated [20260617]


Thank you for your purchase. We hope you are happy with your purchase.

We allow consumers to apply for return or exchange within 14 days after receipt.

To be eligible for a return, your item must be unused and in the same condition you received it. It must also be in the original packaging.

To complete your return, we require a receipt or proof of purchase.

Please do not send your purchase back to the manufacturer directly without any notice.

There are certain situations where only partial refunds are granted (if applicable)

Refunds (if applicable)
Once your return is received and inspected, we will send you an email to notify you that we have received your returned item. We will also notify you of the approval or rejection of your refund.
If you are approved, your refund will be processed, and within 14 days, the refund will be automatically applied to your credit card or original payment method.

Exchanges (if applicable)
We only replace items if they are defective or damaged. If you need to exchange it for the same item, send us an email at info@7artisans.com to get the return address.

Shipping
If the return is caused by the consumer, consumer should be responsible for the shipping fee. The specific fee should be based on the express company you choose. If due to our reasons, the goods received are damaged or incorrect, the consumer is not required to bear the shipping fee for this reason.

Please contact us at info@7artisans.com before shipping your return. Returns sent without prior notification may not be accepted.

You will be responsible for paying for your shipping costs for returning your item. Shipping costs are non-refundable. If you receive a refund, the cost of return shipping will be deducted from your refund.

Depending on where you live, the time it may take for your exchanged product to reach you may vary.

If you are shipping an item over $100, you should consider using a trackable shipping service or purchasing shipping insurance. We don’t guarantee that we will receive your returned item.

QUESTIONS

If you have any questions concerning our return policy, please contact us at:
[customer service email] info@7artisans.com.

Warranty

12-months Warranty

We promise 12-monthswarranty included against defects in material or workmanship.
Warranty does not cover misuse (i.e. liquid, sand, impact damage, etc.).
Free service but buyer pay for shipping and materials.
If you have any non-misuse problems within 7 day you can contact us at the following email : info@7artisans.com

AF 135mm F1.8 MAX

Crafted for Your Next Level

Pure Bokeh | Soft, Dreamy Light Spots

Unleash your creative instinct with the 135mm focal length and F1.8 aperture. The out-of-focus areas flow like a painting, delivering an artistic mood that elevates every portrait to new heights.

Reveal Every Detail — Unlock the Full Potential of High Pixels

Sharpness from Center to Edge — Exceptional Clarity Across the Entire Frame

Aberration & Dispersion Under Control — Crisp and Sharp from Closest Focus to Infinity. Outstanding Resolving Power Perfectly Matches 60MP+ High-Resolution Sensors

🟪ED (Extra-low Dispersion) Glass 🟧High-Refractive Index Glass

16 All-Glass Optical Elements | 60MP Resolving Power

Including 6 ED (Extra-low Dispersion) and 5 high-refractive index lenses; Effortlessly handles 60MP high-resolution cameras

Equipped with a high-performance STM (stepping motor) for quick start/stop response.

STM Silent Stepping Motor

The simplified reduction gear design ensures ultra-quiet operation, delivering fast, precise, and stable autofocus performance

Fast & Smooth – Capture every decisive moment

Fast & Precise Autofocus

Silent, Quiet Operation

0.68m Minimum Focus

  • From 0.68m to Infinity

    Exceptional resolving power at every focusing distance.

Dreamy Bokeh, Pure Artistry

A 12-blade aperture creates naturally circular bokeh, shallow depth isolates your subject with precision, and advanced coatings minimize edge dispersion and artifacts — elevating every image into art.

Pure Light, Pure Night – Exceptional Low-Light Clarity

Clean, detail-rich images in low-light conditions. Faithfully recreates ambient light for nighttime portraits, while delivering well-balanced highlights and shadows in night scenes.

Nano Multi-Coatina for Flawless Glority

Advanced nano layers minimize flare and ghosting, delivering pure,
pristine image quality even in strong backlight

by: boyourself.photography

12-point Sparkling Starbursts – Crafted by a Precision Aperture

A 12-blade precision aperture creates 12 evenly spaced, razor-sharp starbursts from point light sources at f/11–f/16. Each ray is clean, well-defined, and free from flare or soft edges — revealing a pure, powerful starburst aesthetic.

Outstanding Backlight Control – Pure Light, Pure Shadow

  • A precision combination of 6 ED elements and 5 high-refractive index lenses delivers exceptional chromatic aberration correction across the entire focal range. Effectively suppresses purple fringing and green fringing, keeping every detail clean and true.

*Note: For the Z-mount version, the Fn1 and Fn2 buttons can be assigned to different functions. On the E and L versions, both buttons share the same custom function.

Intuitive Control, Lens in Command

Aperture ring and control ring — dual rings working in harmony, responding to every intuitive touch

Precise feedback, stop by stop – Pure mechanical confidence

Click aperture ring – Engineered for E & L mounts

A‑mode auto + F1.8–F16 manual – Full flexibility

Seamless, noiseless transitions – fluid control at your fingertips

Stepless multi-function control ring – deeply optimized for Nikon Z mount

Assign aperture, ISO, or other camera functions – smooth and silent

Anti‑Smudge Coating – Cleaner Lens, Better Performance

The lens surface features a durable anti‑smudge coating that reduces adhesion of fingerprints, water stains, and oil residue. Easy to clean and maintain, it ensures long‑term optical performance

Precision‑Machined Metal Barrel – Built to Last

Crafted from aviation‑grade aluminum with precision CNC machining and anodizing. Excellent corrosion resistance and structural durability for long‑term professional use

Type‑C Firmware Update – Keep Your Lens Evolving

Connect directly to your computer via the Type‑C port for easy firmware upgrades. Stay up‑to‑date with the latest performance enhancements and feature improvements

Ergonomic Anti‑Slip Grip – Stay Comfortable in Every Shot

Precision‑engineered grip texture on the lens barrel provides a solid yet refined tactile feel, significantly improving holding stability during handheld shooting

All‑Weather Dust‑Sealed Mount – Protect Your Optics

The lens mount features a precision dust‑sealing gasket that effectively blocks external dust and particles, providing long‑term stable protection for the core optical elements
